description: Style Note ganuchi gives you a high fashion shoe with this pair. Wear it for that stylish touch to your outfit and give your entire look a classy addition with this pair. Product Details Round toed brown shoes with central lace-ups and stacked heel Leather upper Reinforced overlay at the heel collar Padding around the mouth Upper adhered to the outsole Tough rubber outsole with grooves Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shine
